evidence.title: README (segment 3)
evidence.excerpt: Moku is a fast, minimal manga reader frontend for [Suwayomi-Server](https://github.com/Suwayomi/Suwayomi-Server). It wraps Suwayomi's GraphQL API in a lightweight Tauri app — no Electron overhead.

evidence.title: README (segment 5)
README (segment 7)
evidence.excerpt: - **Library management** — organize manga into folders, track unread counts, filter by genre - **Per-folder sorting & filtering** — each folder has its own independent sort (unread, A–Z, recently read, latest chapter, and more) and publication status filter (Ongoing, Completed, Hiatus, etc.) - **Built-in reader** — single page, long strip, configurable fit modes, customizable keybinds - **Markers** — pin color-coded notes to any page while reading; markers appear as dots on the progress bar and are browseable under Series Detail → Manage → Markers - **Extension support** — install and manage Suwayomi extensions directly from the app - **Download management** — queue and monitor chapter downloads with progress toasts - **Automation** — pre-download titles automatically and optionally delete chapters after they're marked as read (accessible from Series Detail) - **Discord Rich Presence** — shows the manga title, current chapter, and an elapsed timer in your Discord status; configurable in Settings → General - **Auto-start server** — optionally launch Suwayomi in the background on startup - **Multiple themes** — Dark, Light, Midnight, Warm, High Contrast, and more - **Auto-updates** …

evidence.title: v0.9.1
evidence.excerpt: # Moku v0.9.1 **Released:** April 27, 2026 ## New Features - **Touch Gestures** — Pinch-to-zoom now supported in the Reader for improved touchscreen experience (#29) - **Dual-Sync Tracking** — Automated tracking with two-way sync between the Reader and the app (#52) - **Tracking Panel Redesign** — Revamped TrackingPanel UI (WIP) - **Hide Completed Manga** — Completed manga are now able to be hidden in the library - **Downloads Auto-Retry** — New auto-retry button for failed downloads, with toast notification enhancements (#51) - **Update All Extensions** — New button to update all extensions at once - **System-Default Theme Switching** — Automatically switch themes based on your system preference (#45) - **Zoom Keybind Changes** — Ctrl+Scroll now used for Reader zoom (#53) ## Bug Fixes - Fixed Download Queue priority buttons and controls not functioning properly (#54) - Fixed Library folder tab truncation and bulk-move behavior - Fixed Flatpak patches - Fixed MacOS x86 detection logic (untested) ## Notes - Linux packaging is in progress — AppImage, Flatpak, and AUR support are being actively worked on; please report any issues - Tracking redesign is ongoing (WIP) - Touchscreen/ges…

evidence.title: v0.9.0
evidence.excerpt: # Moku v0.9.0 **Released:** April 24, 2026 > **Manual install required for this update.** Due to the overhaul of the update system, v0.9.0 cannot be applied automatically. We apologize for the inconvenience! ## New Features - **UI Overhaul** — Redesigned Home page, History page revamp, and a reworked Layout & Sidebar for a cleaner experience - **Download Queue Management** — Batch select, error/retry support, move-to-top/bottom controls, tooltips, and download notifications (#38) - **Automation Management** — New BulkAutomationPanel with auto-download list derived from filters (#39) - **Per-Manga Reader Settings** — Custom reader settings on a per-manga basis, plus quick Settings access directly from the Reader (#42, #46) - **Pin Sources** — Pin your favorite sources to the top of the Source Tab (#48) - **Library Stats Overhaul** — Always-visible library stats with a full display overhaul (#47) - **Source Install/Uninstall Notifications** — Get notified when extensions are installed or removed (#31) - **Double-Tap for Reader Bar** — Improved touchscreen support with double-tap to toggle the reader bar (#29) - **Import & Export Store** — Backup and restore your data with a new impo…

evidence.title: v0.8.0
evidence.excerpt: # Moku v0.8.0 **Released:** April 13, 2026 ## New Features - **Backup & Settings Overhaul** — Complete redesign of the settings system with full backup support - **Reader Improvements** — Added pan + zoom support and a bookmarking-based "Continue Again" resume feature - **Library Enhancements** — View pending manga updates in your library and toggle your default library from the UI - **Open in File Explorer** — Open direct manga locations from your app - **Check for Updates** — In-app manga update checker (WIP) with refreshed toaster notifications ## Bug Fixes - Fixed chapters loading backwards in infinite scroll mode (#24) - Fixed Scanlator Organization with new Enforce & Block modes (#28) - Fixed Notification Dismissals (#27) - Improved TitleBar on Reader & RTL (#26) - Fixed SeriesDetail -> Reader List (#24) - Passthrough for LocalHost Requests (WIP) & CSS Fix for Auth (#25) - Fixed Flatpak binary detection - Improved splash screen scaling on Windows (WIP) ## Notes - The update checker is a work-in-progress and may not detect new mangas (Pending Feedback) - SplashScreen scaling improvements on Windows are ongoing **Full Changelog:** https://github.com/Youwes09/Moku/compare/v0.7.…

evidence.title: v0.7.1
evidence.excerpt: # Moku v0.7.1 ## Bug Fixes - Fixed authentication on Windows via HTTPS plugin (#22) - Fixed caching logic and auth-related settings warnings - Switched RPC Plugins for optimization purposes ## New Features - Filter chapters by scanlator while reading (#23) ## Notes - Windows auth may exhibit slight lag compared to non-authenticated sessions — this is a known trade-off of the current implementation and will be improved in a future release. **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Youwes09/Moku/compare/v0.7.0...v0.7.1

evidence.title: v0.7.0
evidence.excerpt: # Moku v0.7.0 ## What's New ### Markers (#19) Pages can now be marked with color-coded pins and optional notes while reading. Markers appear as colored dots on the progress bar, can be created with the `N` keybind or the pin button in the reader toolbar, and are browseable per-series under **Series Detail → Manage → Markers**. ### Filtering (#17) Filtering in Library now properly hides titles instead of simply reorganizing them. This allows users to easily navigate through their favorite titles, especially in massive libraries. ### Automation (#18) Although a work-in-progress feature, Moku now has automation for pre-downloading certain titles accessible from the SeriesDetail page. It also allows you to delete chapters upon their completion (marked as read). ## Improvements - Auth URL is now embedded into images for improved compatibility - Revised authentication edge-case handling for more robust connection behavior - SeriesDetail had UI Revision to make more intuitive, including download display changes. ## Bug Fixes - Fixed various CSS issues - Fixed bookmarking notification issue - Testing whether Windows Title-bar now appears upon full-screen (#20) ## Notes **Full Changelog**:…
